calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; Declaration Of Patrick T. Nakao; Exhibits
Off Calendar Jul-31-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. PATRICK T. NAKAO, ESQ. (Tel: 510-524-4545) appearing for plaintiff Susanna Cheung;
Defendants MARK YIU KONG CHENG (Tel: 415-573-4098) and FLORENCE PUI MEE CHENG (Tel: 415-473-8484) appearing in pro per.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF SUSANNA CHEUNG'S Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs.

The Court notes defendants did not notify the Court or the opposing side of any intent to the contest the Court's tentative ruling. Mr. Cheng and Ms. Cheng address the Court. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF SUSANNA CHEUNG's Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs is granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185, E-MAIL: tonyvaughn@yahoo.com (302/EPS)
